name: propr

scripts.test:unit: NODE_ENV=test npx tsx --test test/minimal.test.ts test/modelName.test.ts test/daemonEventIntake.test.ts test/githubEventIntakeMode.test.ts test/intakeModePrerequisites.test.ts test/validateRoutingUrl.test.ts test/routingWebSocketProtocol.test.ts test/routingWebSocketIntakeService.test.ts test/routingStatusPublisher.test.ts packages/api/test/statusRoutes.test.ts
scripts.test:docker: docker-compose run --rm -e REDIS_HOST=redis -e NODE_ENV=test worker npx tsx --test test/*.test.ts
scripts.test:docker:single: docker-compose run --rm -e REDIS_HOST=redis -e NODE_ENV=test worker npx tsx --test
scripts.test:docker:quick: docker-compose run --rm -e REDIS_HOST=redis -e NODE_ENV=test worker sh -c 'npx tsx --test test/*.test.ts --test-exclude="**/agentRegistry.test.ts"'
scripts.test:docker:timeout: docker-compose run --rm -e REDIS_HOST=redis -e NODE_ENV=test worker timeout 30 npx tsx --test test/*.test.ts
scripts.test:docker:clean: docker ps --filter 'name=propr-worker-run' -q | xargs -r docker stop; npm run test:docker
scripts.test:docker:verbose: docker-compose run --rm -e REDIS_HOST=redis -e NODE_ENV=test worker sh -c 'for f in test/*.test.ts; do echo "=== Testing: $f ==="; npx tsx --test "$f" || echo "FAILED: $f"; done'
scripts.test:docker:find-hanging: docker-compose run --rm -e REDIS_HOST=redis -e NODE_ENV=test worker sh -c 'for f in test/*.test.ts; do echo "=== Testing: $f ==="; timeout 5 npx tsx --test "$f" > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✓ PASSED" || echo "✗ FAILED or TIMEOUT"; done'
scripts.test:docker:stable: docker-compose run --rm -e REDIS_HOST=redis -e NODE_ENV=test worker sh -c 'for f in test/*.test.ts; do [[ "$f" == *"agentRegistry"* ]] && continue; echo "=== Testing: $f ==="; timeout 10 npx tsx --test "$f" > /dev/null 2>&1 && echo "✓ PASSED" || echo "✗ FAILED or TIMEOUT"; done'

author: Unchained Development OÜ / Rinalds Uzkalns
description: Automated GitHub Issue Processor with AI-powered solution generation and unified Plan Studio workflow.
